hero.subtitle: Enterprise R&D workflow: refresh docs on every push; trigger deploys from the web with traceable, interruptible runs and live logs.

repos.title: Repositories
repos.subtitle: Pick a repository to generate structured docs or ship a deployment—same flow as modern hosting dashboards, tuned for your GitLab server.

closing.title: Ready when your team is
closing.subtitle: Wire up webhooks once—then ship docs and deployments from the dashboard.

footer.line1: © {{year}} RepoPilot · Docs from comments · Traceable deploys

documentation.title: Documentation pipeline
documentation.lede: Turn source comments into structured online docs: GitLab triggers incremental updates; parse failures alert without blocking the main flow.

deploy.title: One-click deploy
deploy.lede: Trigger deploy tasks from the web; backend executes via PTY and streams logs over WebSocket; cancel and timeouts supported.
